detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專業英文(一) (Professional English I)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
By the end of the first semester, students will be able to: 1. identify the fundamental roles and responsibilities of conference interpreters in professional settings. 2. apply essential skills for consecutive interpreting, including shadowing, active listening, reformulation, and structured note-taking. 3. demonstrate effective memory retention techniques and strategies for managing speech content during interpretation. 4. develop personal glossaries and begin building professional terminology resources based on assigned topics. 5. reflect on individual performance through peer feedback and in-class self-assessment activities 


2.教學綱要
Using Conference Interpreting: A Student’s Practice Book by Andrew Gillies as the core material, students will build a strong foundation in consecutive interpreting during the first semester and develop essential simultaneous interpreting skills in the second semester. Through structured in-class training, real-world simulations, and self-assessment activities, students will gradually acquire the professional competence required for interpreting in international contexts. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : 自編教材　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. In-class participation, homework, and quizzes 25% 2. Mid-term(presentation) 25% 3. Final exam (presentation) 25% 4. Weekly Attendance 25% 
1.We are all responsible for maintaining a good learning ambiance for the class. 2. When you enter the classroom, make sure you have already set your Samrt on silent mode. You might lose points if you’re distracted by your phone. 3. Professional behavior and respectful classroom etiquette are expected at all times. 4. If you plan to be absent, inform the instructor no later than one week prior to the class. Unnotified absences may affect your final grade. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG8 合適的工作及經濟成長


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
